problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: If Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting is applied to essential, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
